samples.gvd:
module multi_pipe_8bit(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input mul_en_in,
    input [7:0] mul_a,
    input [7:0] mul_b,
    output mul_en_out,
    output [15:0] mul_out,
    input mul_en_in,
    output mul_en_out_reg,
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output mul_en_out_reg,
    output mul_en_out_reg,
    input mul_en_in,
    input mul_en_out_reg,
    output mul_en_out,
    input mul_en_out_reg,
    output mul_en_out,
    output mul_en_out,
    input [7:0] mul_a,
    output [7:0] mul_a_reg,
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output mul_a_reg,
    input mul_en_in,
    output mul_a_reg,
    input mul_a,
    output mul_a_reg,
    output mul_a_reg,
    input [7:0] mul_b,
    output [7:0] mul_b_reg,
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output mul_b_reg,
    input mul_en_in,
    output mul_b_reg,
    input mul_b,
    output mul_b_reg,
    output mul_b_reg,
    input [7:0] mul_a_reg,
    input [7:0] mul_b_reg,
    output [15:0] temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_b_reg,
    output temp,
    input mul_a_reg,
    output temp,
    input [15:0] temp,
    output [15:0] sum,
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output sum
);
dmodule
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal. Defined as 0 for chip reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal that controls the multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Input signal representing the multiplicand with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Input signal representing the multiplier with a data width of 8 bits.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output signal with a data width of 16 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="N">Set to 8 to represent an 8-bit multiplier.</parameter>
        <parameter id="N_1">Set to 7 to represent the number of bits minus one for an 8-bit multiplier.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_en_out_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_en_in for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_en_in"/>
            <output id="mul_en_out_reg"/>
            <always>
                <condition><input id="clk"/> has a rising edge.</condition>
                <statement>if <condition><input id="rst_n"/> equals 0.</condition> then <compound>
                    <statement>set <output id="mul_en_out_reg"/> to 0.</statement>
                </compound>
                <else>
                    <statement>set <output id="mul_en_out_reg"/> to <input id="mul_en_in"/>.</statement>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_en_out" type="combinational_logic">
            <description>Output signal indicating if the multiplication operation is enabled. Derived from the most significant bit of mul_en_out_reg.</description>
            <input id="mul_en_out_reg"/>
            <output id="mul_en_out"/>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_en_out_reg"/>[<parameter id="N_1"/>] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="mul_en_out"/> to 1.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="mul_en_out"/> to 0.</false_statement>
            </assign>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_a_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_a for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]"/>
            <output id="mul_a_reg" width_description="[7:0]"/>
            <always>
                <condition><input id="clk"/> has a rising edge.</condition>
                <statement>if <condition><input id="rst_n"/> equals 0.</condition> then <compound>
                    <statement>set <output id="mul_a_reg"/> to 8'b00000000.</statement>
                </compound>
                <else>
                    <statement>if <condition><input id="mul_en_in"/> equals 1.</condition> then <compound>
                        <statement>set <output id="mul_a_reg"/> to <input id="mul_a"/>.</statement>
                    </compound>
                    <else>
                        <statement>set <output id="mul_a_reg"/> to <output id="mul_a_reg"/>.</statement>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="mul_b_reg" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Register to store the value of mul_b for use in the next clock cycle.</description>
            <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]"/>
            <output id="mul_b_reg" width_description="[7:0]"/>
            <always>
                <condition><input id="clk"/> has a rising edge.</condition>
                <statement>if <condition><input id="rst_n"/> equals 0.</condition> then <compound>
                    <statement>set <output id="mul_b_reg"/> to 8'b00000000.</statement>
                </compound>
                <else>
                    <statement>if <condition><input id="mul_en_in"/> equals 1.</condition> then <compound>
                        <statement>set <output id="mul_b_reg"/> to <input id="mul_b"/>.</statement>
                    </compound>
                    <else>
                        <statement>set <output id="mul_b_reg"/> to <output id="mul_b_reg"/>.</statement>
                    </else>
                </else>
            </always>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="temp" type="combinational_logic">
            <description>Set of wires to store the intermediate values of the partial products.</description>
            <input id="mul_a_reg" width_description="[7:0]"/>
            <input id="mul_b_reg" width_description="[7:0]"/>
            <output id="temp" width_description="[15:0]"/>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[0] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[0] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/>.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[0] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[1] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[1] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/> shifted left by 1.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[1] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[2] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[2] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/> shifted left by 2.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[2] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[3] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[3] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/> shifted left by 3.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[3] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[4] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[4] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/> shifted left by 4.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[4] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[5] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[5] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/> shifted left by 5.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[5] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[6] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[6] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/> shifted left by 6.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[6] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
            <assign>
                <condition><input id="mul_b_reg"/>[7] equals 1.</condition>
                <true_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[7] to <input id="mul_a_reg"/> shifted left by 7.</true_statement>
                <false_statement>set <output id="temp"/>[7] to 8'b00000000.</false_statement>
            </assign>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="sum" type="sequential_logic">
            <description>Set of registers to store the intermediate values of the partial sums.</description>
            <input id="temp" width_description="[15:0]"/>
            <output id="sum" width_description="[15:0]"/>
            <always>
                <condition><input id="clk"/> has a rising edge.</condition>
                <statement>if <condition><input id="rst_n"/> equals 0.</condition> then <compound>
                    <statement>set <output id="sum"/>[0] to 1
